hooks.command: cargo fmt && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && npm run fix && npm run type-check && git add -u || exit 2
hooks.statusMessage: Running cargo fmt + clippy + fix + type-check before commit...

hooks.command:
prompt=$(cat); if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE ' (plan|break.?down|roadmap|sequence|implement.?steps) '; then   npx virage read-skill-summary planner 2>/dev/null || true; elif echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE ' (ADR|architect|interface.?design|system.?design|refactor.?scope) '; then   npx virage read-skill-summary architect 2>/dev/null || true; elif echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE ' (docs?|README|CHANGELOG|document|write.?up) '; then   npx virage read-skill-summary doc-writer 2>/dev/null || true; elif echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE ' (review|security|vulnerabilit|audit) '; then   npx virage read-skill-summary code-guard 2>/dev/null || true; fi; EXCERPT=$(echo "$prompt" | head -c 400); RAG=$(npx virage query "$EXCERPT" --json --top-k 3 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if [ -n "$RAG" ] && [ "$RAG" != "[]" ]; then   node -e "const r=JSON.parse(process.argv[1]);if(!r||!r.length)process.exit(0);process.stdout.write(['
# Virage RAG Context
'].concat(r.map(c=>'## '+(c.sourceFile||'?')+'
'+c.denseText.slice(0,600)+'
')).join('
'))" "$RAG" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
